creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: koobs
Date: Thu Oct 24 13:02:54 2013
New Revision: 331483
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/331483

Log:
  databases/py-mysql2pgsql: Fix build, Enable AUTOPLIST support
  
  - Use DISTNAME to match upstream name
  - Remove DIST_SUBDIR
  - Update COMMENT
  - Add pytz to RUN_DEPENDS
  - Set USE_PYTHON to 2.7 only
  - Enable AUTOPLIST support and delete pkg-plist accordingly
  - Re-order Makefile and whitespace align
  
  PR:		ports/181981
  Submitted by:	Volodymyr Kostyrko <c.kworr@gmail.com> (maintainer)
  Approved by:	maintainer

Deleted:
  head/databases/py-mysql2pgsql/pkg-plist
Modified:
  head/databases/py-mysql2pgsql/Makefile
  head/databases/py-mysql2pgsql/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/databases/py-mysql2pgsql/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/py-mysql2pgsql/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 12:40:27 2013	(r331482)
+++ head/databases/py-mysql2pgsql/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 13:02:54 2013	(r331483)
@@ -4,17 +4,23 @@ PORTNAME=	mysql2pgsql
 PORTVERSION=	0.1.6
 CATEGORIES=	databases python
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
-DIST_SUBDIR=	postgresql
+DISTNAME=	py-${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	c.kworr@gmail.com
-COMMENT=	Tool for migrating/converting from mysql to postgresql
+COMMENT=	Tool for migrating/converting from MySQL to PostgreSQL
 
 LICENSE=	MIT
 
-RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}MySQLdb>0:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-MySQLdb \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}psycopg2>0:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-psycopg2 \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}termcolor>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-termcolor \
-		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}yaml>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-yaml
+RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}MySQLdb>=1.2.3:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-MySQLdb \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}psycopg2>=2.4.2:${PORTSDIR}/databases/py-psycopg2 \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}termcolor>=1.1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-termcolor \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}yaml>=3.10.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-yaml \
+		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pytz>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-pytz
+
+USE_PYTHON=		2.7
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	py_${PORTNAME}
+PYDISTUTILS_AUTOPLIST=	yes
 
 USE_GITHUB=	yes
 GH_ACCOUNT=	philipsoutham
@@ -22,9 +28,5 @@ GH_COMMIT=	250cb1c
 GH_PROJECT=	py-${PORTNAME}
 GH_TAGNAME=	v${PORTVERSION}
 
-USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
-PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME=	py_${PORTNAME}
-
 NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/databases/py-mysql2pgsql/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/py-mysql2pgsql/distinfo	Thu Oct 24 12:40:27 2013	(r331482)
+++ head/databases/py-mysql2pgsql/distinfo	Thu Oct 24 13:02:54 2013	(r331483)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (postgresql/mysql2pgsql-0.1.6.tar.gz) = 74c4b453a2e425bb91f1344dc6187d263b2f7c6c35532ceff62799afa157f56b
-SIZE (postgresql/mysql2pgsql-0.1.6.tar.gz) = 107283
+SHA256 (py-mysql2pgsql-0.1.6.tar.gz) = 74c4b453a2e425bb91f1344dc6187d263b2f7c6c35532ceff62799afa157f56b
+SIZE (py-mysql2pgsql-0.1.6.tar.gz) = 107283
